1<?php
2
3namespace Local\Permission\Exceptions;
4
5use Illuminate\Auth\Access\AuthorizationException;
6
7/**
8 * Extends Laravel's own AuthorizationException so the host app's exception
9 * handler renders it exactly like any other 403 — no wiring needed in the
10 * consuming project (Core\Exceptions\Handler already matches on
11 * AuthorizationException).
12 */
13class UnauthorizedException extends AuthorizationException
14{
15    /**
16     * @param  array<int, string>  $roles
17     */
18    public static function forRoles(array $roles): self
19    {
20        return new self('User does not have any of the necessary roles: '.implode(', ', $roles));
21    }
22
23    /**
24     * @param  array<int, string>  $permissions
25     */
26    public static function forPermissions(array $permissions): self
27    {
28        return new self('User does not have any of the necessary permissions: '.implode(', ', $permissions));
29    }
30}

Legend

Covered by small (and larger) testsCovered by medium (and large) testsCovered by large tests (and tests of unknown size)Not coveredNot coverable
